strategy_description: Scale position size proportionally to signal strength (0% to 100% invested).
notes: Backfilled 2026-04-23 from tournament_results_20260314.csv per Wave 10I.A; OOS dates reconstructed from default monthly/daily windows. Fields: signal_column=spread_roc_21d, threshold_rule=lt (inferred from T1_p25 + direction=countercyclical), strategy_family=P2_signal_strength, oos_n_trades=1981 (from tournament CSV oos_n column — period count, not discrete trade count), OOS window 2015-01-01..2025-12-31 (daily default reconstruction).
